scripts.build: pnpm --filter @clover/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @clover/std run build && pnpm --filter @clover/zod run build && pnpm --filter @clover/example-url-normalizer run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @clover/protocol run typecheck && pnpm --filter @clover/std run typecheck && pnpm --filter @clover/zod run typecheck && pnpm --filter @clover/example-url-normalizer run typecheck
